title: UAE announces early spring break for schools and universities: Dates, classes resumption, all you need to know
summary_full: UAE schools and universities will observe an early spring break from March 9 to March 22, 2026. This extended holiday, confirmed by the Ministry of Education and Ministry of Higher Education, applies to all public and private institutions, including students, teaching, and administrative staff. Classes and official duties will resume on Monday, March 23, 2026.
